name: sir pentious and his egg boiz
description:
|🥚| "MY MINIONS!! THEY’RE MISSI— ..huh?" -sir pentious |🥚|

Okay so at 1 AM i made a angel dust bot where you dress up fat nuggets and then i was like '..what about the other pets of hazbin hotel?' And i know that the egg boys don’t qualify as a pet but they are his companions, SO THEY WILL BE DIVAFIED!

Here’s the link to my angeldust and fat nuggets bot: Angeldust and fat nuggets here!
